info.name: VaxTrack — Admin Module API
info.description:
Complete Admin Module collection for VaxTrack (Banana Logistics). Use the 'Auth' folder to login and capture the token into {{adminToken}}. Set {{baseUrl}} = http://localhost:5000 in your environment.

## E2E Apr 2026
Mobiles in this file use 88450101xx after a fresh register. Driver roles in API are driver eicher / driver pickup. Enquiry becomes COMPLETED only after OM approves Munshi packing (not on driver trip).

request.description: Returns the logged-in Admin's profile.
Writes a LOGOUT audit log entry. Client must delete the stored token after this call.

Returns: totalEnquiries, pendingVisits, selectedPlots, rejectedPlots, tripsCompleted, alertsCount.

**Updated (Apr 2026):** The `enquiries` object now also includes:
- `missedPlots` — enquiries whose scheduledDate is in the past and status is still PENDING
- `rescheduled` — enquiries with status RESCHEDULED
Returns three alert categories: missedFields (past scheduledDate still PENDING), missingUploads (Trips with no slip photos), eodIssues (DailyLogs STARTED > 12h ago)
Returns daily inspection stats grouped by date, future scheduled visits, and status pipeline summary
Returns total KM + visited plots per Field Selector, and total assigned plots per Field Owner

item.name: GET Field Visit Monitoring (NEW — frontend contract)

query.description: PENDING | SELECTED | REJECTED | MISSED | ASSIGNED | RATE_FIXED | COMPLETED
Filter table rows by Company ObjectId (NEW Apr 2026)

request.description:
PRIMARY endpoint for Field Visit Monitoring page.

## Response Shape (frontend contract):
```json
{
  "counts": { "totalPlots": 42, "selected": 12, "rejected": 5, "futureSelection": 3, "missed": 4 },
  "filters": {
    "locations": ["Solapur", "Pune"],
    "fieldOwners": [{ "id": "...", "name": "Raj Sharma" }],
    "selectors": [{ "id": "...", "name": "Prashant Desai" }]
  },
  "tableData": [
    {
      "id": "...",
      "enquiryId": "ENQ-...",
      "farmerName": "Santosh Ingale",
      "location": "Solapur",
      "fieldOwner": "Raj Sharma",
      "fieldSelector": "Prashant Desai",
      "visitDate": null,
      "harvestTime": null,
      "status": "PENDING",
      "action": "View Details"
    }
  ],
  "pagination": { "page": 1, "totalPages": 5 }
}
```

## Dynamic Button Logic (computed server-side in 'action' field):
- PENDING → View Details
- SELECTED → Fix Rate
- MISSED → Reassign
- RESCHEDULED → Reschedule
- ASSIGNED/REJECTED/RATE_FIXED → View Details

## Tabs ↔ status param:
- All → (no status param)
- Selected → status=SELECTED
- Rejected → status=REJECTED
- Future → status=RESCHEDULED
- Missed → status=MISSED

Consolidated single-call endpoint for the Field Selection Management page.

## Response Shape (frontend contract):
```json
{
  "stats": {
    "todayVisited": 56,
    "selected": 25,
    "rejected": 4,
    "futureSelection": 8,
    "missed": 10,
    "fixRate": 20
  },
  "todayVisitedPlots": [...],
  "fieldSelectorData": [{ "selectorName": "Mauli Bhosle", "totalKM": 150, "totalVisitedPlots": 12 }],
  "fieldOwnerData": [{ "ownerName": "Shubham Ransing", "totalAssignedPlots": 5 }],
  "enquiryProgress": [{ "enquiryId": "...", "farmerName": "...", "rate": "₹12.80/kg", "company": "Nature", "status": "SELECTED" }]
}
```

item.name: GET Single Enquiry Details — View Details (full contract)

request.description:
Returns full enquiry with all joins including logistics.

## Response Shape (frontend View Details contract):
```json
{
  "farmerName": "Parag Survase",
  "mobile": "9876543210",
  "location": "Falwani",
  "subLocation": "...",
  "boxCount": 600,
  "packingType": "13 Kg",
  "rate": 918,
  "company": "Nature",
  "status": "SELECTED",
  "fieldOwner": { "name": "Vikas Wagh", "mobile": "8390002226" },
  "fieldSelector": { "name": "Mauli Bhosle", "remarks": "High quality 20-30% pulp" },
  "logistics": {
    "munshi": "Hakim",
    "driver": "Sidhu Wagh",
    "driverMobile": "...",
    "vehicleNumber": "MH45AF8299",
    "teamName": "Team_Hakim"
  },
  "inspection": { ... }
}
```
Updates an enquiry. If a new assignedSelectorId is provided, the status automatically shifts to ASSIGNED.
Reschedules a missed field visit. Enquiry must be PENDING or SELECTED.

body.raw:
{
  "companyId": "{{companyId}}",
  "purchaseRate": 918,
  "packingType": "5H",
  "estimatedBoxes": 312,
  "remarks": "E2E Apr 2026: FO rate lock aligned to Verdant Ridge 5H program."
}

request.description:
Enquiry must be SELECTED. Sets companyId, purchaseRate, remarks, and status → RATE_FIXED.

**New Optional Fields (2026-03-29):**
- packingType: Enum — '4H', '5H', '6H', '8H', 'CL', '7Kg', 'Other'
- estimatedBoxes: Number — planned harvest quantity

These planning fields are stored on the Enquiry and can be further overridden by the OM during team assignment.
Manually triggers the SLA timeout check. Finds all ASSIGNED enquiries not visited in 24h, logs the missed selector into missedAssignments, and resets them to PENDING.
Returns all enquiries where missedAssignments is not empty. Each entry includes the selector(s) who failed to visit within 24h (firstName, lastName, mobileNo), sorted by updatedAt descending.
Guard: Enquiry status MUST be RATE_FIXED or this returns 400. Triggers Munshi + Driver WhatsApp alerts.

Admin can roll over any Logistics assignment to the next harvest day. Clones same Munshi, Driver, Pickup Driver, Vehicle with fresh PENDING status. isRollover=true, parentAssignmentId links to the original.

Replace {{enquiryId}} with the actual Logistics assignment _id (not enquiry _id).

Add an extra vehicle to an existing assignment when the original vehicle is full. Creates a new overflow Logistics record with isOverflow=true, parentAssignmentId pointing to the original.

Required: driverId
Optional (defaults to original assignment values if omitted): munshiId, companyId, purchaseRate, totalBoxes, priority, lightInTime, lightOutTime, teamName, scheduledDate

WhatsApp notifications sent to: extra driver, assigned munshi, and original driver.

Access: Admin, Operational Manager, Munshi.
Also available via: POST /api/munshi/assignments/:id/add-vehicle

Returns the full chain for any assignment: the root original assignment, all rollovers (extra days), and all overflows (extra vehicles). Walks up parentAssignmentId to find the root, then fetches all descendants.

Response: { original, rollovers[], overflows[], totalRelated }
Lists all system users. Filter by role or isActive status.

Available roles: Admin | Field Owner | Field Selector | Operational Manager | Munshi | driver eicher | driver pickup

vehicleId is OPTIONAL — only needed for driver roles. Providing it links the driver to their vehicle in a single call, so no separate PUT is required.
Get vehicle IDs from GET /api/master-data/vehicles.
Flips isActive boolean. Admin cannot toggle their own account.

Updates user details. Can update: firstName, lastName, mobileNo, email, role, password.

vehicleId (optional) — links or clears a driver's vehicle. Pass null to unlink: { "vehicleId": null }. Ignored for non-driver roles.

Response includes populated vehicleId object (vehicleNumber + vehicleType).

item.name: GET Form Dropdowns (Companies, Agents, Generations, Selectors, Drivers)

request.description:
Single endpoint to populate all UI select boxes in Create Enquiry and Fix Rate forms. Returns: companies[], agents[], generations[], selectors[].

Access: Admin, Field Owner, Operational Manager.

body.raw:
{
  "agentName": "Sahyadri Fresh Connect",
  "mobileNo": "8845010112",
  "contactPerson": "Neha Kulkarni",
  "location": "Sangli",
  "notes": "Reliable agent for Sangli cluster. 5% commission."
}

exec: if (res._id) { pm.collectionVariables.set('companyId', res._id); console.log('companyId saved:', res._id); }

body.raw:
{
  "companyName": "Verdant Ridge Cold Chain LLP",
  "legalName": "Verdant Ridge Cold Chain LLP",
  "taxId": "27AABCV8845E1Z9",
  "headquarters": "Pune, Maharashtra",
  "procurementNotes": "E2E Apr 2026 seed: G9 Cavendish 5H focus; min 250 boxes; NET-10."
}

request.description: vehicleType enum: 'Eicher' or 'Pickup' only
Returns paginated notification feed with unreadCount. Add ?unreadOnly=true to filter.

item.name: PATCH Mark All Notifications as Read

body.raw:
{
  "mobile": "9876543210",
  "farmerName": "Suresh Patil",
  "message": "Dear Suresh ji, your banana rate has been fixed at ₹850/box by Reliance Fresh. Our team will arrive on 10-Mar-2026 at 6:00 AM. Please ensure your field is ready. - VaxTrack",

  "type": "RATE_FIXED"
}

request.description: Triggers WhatsApp alert to farmer and logs a notification entry in the Admin feed.
Returns total revenue, avg rate, wastage %, grouped by Location and Company. All query params are optional filters.
Downloads a styled .xlsx file. Save response to file in Postman (Send and Download).
Returns paginated audit log with User (name, role), Action, Module, Before/After Change, DateTime. All query params optional.

item.name: POST Issue Diesel Advance to Driver

formdata.description: OPTIONAL — override vehicle number. If omitted, auto-resolved from driver's linked vehicleId.
Optional — link to a logistics assignment

request.description:
Issues a fuel advance to the driver.

vehicleNumber is now OPTIONAL — it is auto-resolved from the driver's linked vehicleId.vehicleNumber. Only send vehicleNumber if the driver is using a different vehicle than their default (edge case).

If the driver has no vehicle linked AND no vehicleNumber in body → returns 400 with a helpful message.

Triggers WhatsApp receipt to the driver's registered mobile. Audit log is created automatically.

query.description: Filter by a specific logistics assignment

request.description:
Returns a paginated list of all diesel advances. Populated with driver name/mobile, OM name, and linked assignment details.

Use ?driverId= to filter per driver or ?assignmentId= to see advances for a specific trip.

query.description: Filter all data by company ObjectId

request.description:
Single combined dashboard API. Returns everything the Analytics page needs in one call.

## Response shape:
```json
{
  "topStats": {
    "totalRevenue": 2560000,
    "totalBoxes": 2800,
    "avgPurchaseRate": 914,
    "assignmentsCount": 12
  },
  "monthlyTrend": [ { "label": "2026-03", "total": 18, "selected": 10, "ratFixed": 6, "completed": 4 } ],
  "locationPerformance": [ { "location": "Jalgaon", "totalBoxes": 1200, "totalRevenue": 1104000, "avgRate": 920, "plotCount": 5 } ],
  "companyPerformance": [ { "companyName": "Reliance Fresh", "totalBoxes": 280, "totalRevenue": 257600, "avgRate": 920, "assignmentsCount": 1 } ],
  "recentTransactions": [ { ... last 5 logistics assignments ... } ],
  "fieldSelectors": [
    {
      "name": "Vaishnav Kadam",
      "visits": 9,
      "selectPercentage": 11.1
    }
  ],
  "munshis": [
    {
      "name": "Rohan Jadhav",
      "loads": 4,
      "wastage": "-"
    }
  ],
  "drivers": [
    {
      "name": "Ganesh Lawand",
      "trips": 2,
      "onTime": "-"
    }
  ]
}
```

## Filters (all optional):
- `startDate` / `endDate` — ISO date strings, applied to Logistics.createdAt and Enquiry.createdAt
- `location` — case-insensitive partial match on enquiry location
- `companyId` — exact company ObjectId

## Personnel arrays:
- `fieldSelectors.selectPercentage` = (selected enquiries / total assigned enquiries) * 100
- `munshis.loads` = assignments handled by munshi
- `drivers.trips` = assignments handled by driver

query.description: PENDING | SELECTED | RATE_FIXED | ASSIGNED | COMPLETED | REJECTED

request.description:
Location-grouped performance report. Each row represents one location.

## Response shape:
```json
{
  "summary": {
    "totalLocations": 8,
    "totalEnquiries": 120,
    "totalSelected": 55,
    "totalBoxes": 12400,
    "totalRevenue": 11408000,
    "overallSelectionPercentage": 45.83
  },
  "tableData": [
    {
      "location": "Jalgaon",
      "totalEnquiries": 40,
      "selectedCount": 20,
      "selectionPercentage": 50.00,
      "totalBoxes": 4200,
      "totalRevenue": 3864000
    }
  ],
  "page": 1,
  "pages": 1
}
```

`selectionPercentage` = (selectedCount / totalEnquiries) × 100, rounded to 2 decimal places.
`totalRevenue` = purchaseRate × totalBoxes from the linked Logistics record (via $lookup).
Existing master report (COMPLETED enquiries). Returns: summary totals, byLocation, byCompany, wastage stats.
Downloads a formatted Excel file (.xlsx) of all enquiries matching the optional filters. Use 'Send and Download' in Postman.

item.name: NEW — Req 3: Master Setup Status Toggle (Activate/Deactivate)

request.description: Activate or Deactivate an Agent. isActive=false deactivates (safe, reversible), isActive=true reactivates.
Activate or Deactivate a Vehicle. isActive=false deactivates (safe, reversible), isActive=true reactivates.

Activate or Deactivate a Generation (banana variety). isActive=false deactivates (safe, reversible), isActive=true reactivates.

GET /api/master-data/generations returns only active records by default. Pass ?includeInactive=true to see all.
Pass ?includeInactive=true to see both active and deactivated records. Without it, only isActive=true records are returned.

item.name: GET Petrol Advance Distribution (Day / Month / Year + Per Selector)

query.description: day | month | year. day = last 30 days, month = last 12 months, year = all years
Optional: filter to a single field selector

formdata.description: Optional — auto-resolved from driver's linked vehicle
Optional — link to a Logistics assignment

request.description: Issue a diesel advance to an Eicher or Pickup driver. vehicleNumber is auto-resolved from the driver's linked vehicle if not provided. Triggers WhatsApp receipt to driver.
Paginated list of all diesel advances. Drivers see only their own records automatically.

item.name: GET Diesel Advance Distribution (Day / Month / Year + Per Driver)

query.description: day | month | year. day = last 30 days, month = last 12 months, year = all years
Optional: filter to a single driver

item.name: 12. Reports (NEW Apr 2026)
item.description: New dedicated reporting endpoints. Require Admin or Operational Manager token.

query.description: Search by farmer name or mobile

request.description:
Returns top-level stats and a paginated logistics/execution table for the Detailed Execution Report page.

## Response Shape:
```json
{
  "stats": {
    "totalEnquiries": 100,
    "selectedPlots": 60,
    "rejectedPlots": 8,
    "missedPlots": 5,
    "rescheduled": 3
  },
  "total": 30,
  "page": 1,
  "pages": 2,
  "tableData": [
    {
      "mobile": "9876543210",
      "location": "Solapur",
      "teamName": "Team Hakim",
      "eicherDriver": "Sidhu Wagh",
      "weight": 312,
      "wastage": 5.5
    }
  ]
}
```

Returns aggregated harvesting data per Munshi (all Munshis, Admin scope). Covers current month + last 3 months (quarterly).

## Response Shape:
```json
[
  {
    "munshiName": "Hakim Shaikh",
    "perDay": 120,
    "perMonth": 2400,
    "quarterly": 6800
  }
]
```

Values represent **total boxes packed** (not weight in kg).
